name: standards-refresh.sh runs the four-layer fidelity draft per emitted rule and writes the per-rule fidelity audit trail into the target YAML
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r16-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out && cat > $OUT/s.html <<'HTML'

Doc

Rule one

prose one.

Rule two

prose two.

HTML cat > $OUT/reg.yaml <e.err; T=$OUT/out/european-union/r16-src.yaml; [ -f $T ] && grep -q 'fidelity:' $T && grep -q 'clauses_total: 1' $T && grep -q 'no_clause_dropped: true' $T && [ "$(grep -c 'fidelity:' $T | tr -d ' ')" = "2" ] && echo fidelity-audit-trail-per-rule 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
